_comment: Heads-up blackjack from a committed 52-card deck. Deal order is player, dealer, player, dealer off the top: player gets 10s + Kd = 20 and stands; dealer gets 9h + 8c = 17 and stands. 20 > 17 so player (player 1) wins, reason player_higher. deck_commitment is omitted, so the CLI fills in the honest sha256(deck); the guest re-checks sha256(deck) == deck_commitment inside the proof. Card id = suit*13 + rank (rank 0..12 = 2..Ace, suit 0..4).
